label: Bundle Actions
description: Simulate (dry run) and submit bundle actions with leg count badge and status feedback.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.8.note: — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. Fixed: wired readOnly from context to disable Simulate and Submit buttons in batch mode.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No mock imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field. 0.7 Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard). 0.8 N/A — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors. 0.9 No dead code. Fixed: wired readOnly from context to disable Simulate and Submit buttons in batch mode.

1.1.note: Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, readOnly).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters templates by org DeFi desk presence.

1.3.note: Org filter changes scoped templates via hasDefiDesk memo. 1.4-1.5 Bundle context filters templates by org scope; client/strategy cascade N/A for this action-panel widget (no per-client data).

1.4.note: 1.5 Bundle context filters templates by org scope; client/strategy cascade N/A for this action-panel widget (no per-client data).

1.5.note: Bundle context filters templates by org scope; client/strategy cascade N/A for this action-panel widget (no per-client data).

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → hasDefiDesk=true → unfiltered templates returned.

1.7.note: Reference data (BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS, BUNDLE_VENUES, ALL_OPERATION_TYPES) in lib/config/services/bundle.config — correct location.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, readOnly). 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters templates by org DeFi desk presence. 1.3 Org filter changes scoped templates via hasDefiDesk memo. 1.4-1.5 Bundle context filters templates by org scope; client/strategy cascade N/A for this action-panel widget (no per-client data). 1.6 Empty scope arrays → hasDefiDesk=true → unfiltered templates returned. 1.7 Reference data (BUNDLE_INSTRUMENTS, BUNDLE_VENUES, ALL_OPERATION_TYPES) in lib/config/services/bundle.config — correct location.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l4.notes: Known L4 issue: Simulate and Submit buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons. Needs wiring in L4.
